c.d: Evaluates the randomness and even distribution of songs when shuffle mode is enabled, avoiding frequent repetition or predictable patterns.
Assesses the ease of creating, editing, and managing playlists, including adding, removing, and reordering songs.
Determines the availability and ease of downloading songs for offline listening without an internet connection.
Judges the app's design, ease of navigation, and overall user-friendliness.
Lists the variety of audio formats supported by the app (e.g., MP3, FLAC, AAC).
